idea: Weekly surge in Google Trends for DIY home improvement combined with XLP relative strength

data.source: Google Trends weekly for 'home improvement' and Yahoo Finance weekly prices for XLP

behavior: A spike in interest in DIY home improvement often precedes increased demand for consumer staples related to home care and building materials.

market_impact.rationale: Consumer staples benefit from increased home improvement spending signals.

trade_logic.entry: Enter long XLP when Google Trends for 'home improvement' rises more than 15% week-over-week and XLP outperforms SPY over prior week
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 3 weeks or if Google Trends decline by 10% week-over-week

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Weekly Google Trends data frequently show interest bursts around seasonal home projects.

idea: Labor jobs report weekly acceleration in healthcare hiring paired with XLV outperformance

data.source: Labor jobs weekly healthcare sector job postings and Yahoo Finance weekly XLV prices

behavior: A rapid weekly increase in healthcare job postings signals anticipated sector growth and potential upward earnings revisions.

market_impact.rationale: Healthcare hiring acceleration suggests improving fundamentals for healthcare stocks.

trade_logic.entry: Enter long XLV when healthcare job postings increase more than 7% week-over-week and XLV outperforms SPY that week
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 4 weeks or when job postings growth falls below 3% week-over-week

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Healthcare jobs data update weekly with frequent visible accelerations.

idea: Consumer stress surge: weekly spike in Google search for 'rent strike' and XLI weakness

data.source: Google Trends weekly for 'rent strike' and Yahoo Finance weekly XLI prices

behavior: Rising consumer stress around housing payments can presage reduced industrial demand due to broader economic caution.

market_impact.rationale: Industrial sector performance is sensitive to consumer financial stress signals.

trade_logic.entry: Short XLI when 'rent strike' search interest rises over 20% week-over-week and XLI underperforms SPY
trade_logic.exit: Cover after 3 weeks or when search interest declines by 10% week-over-week

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Social stress searches commonly spike in reaction to economic uncertainty.

idea: Freight logistics daily rise in railcar load counts with XLI outperformance

data.source: Freight Rail daily carloads and Yahoo Finance daily XLI prices

behavior: Increasing railcar loads typically indicate rising industrial activity and supply chain momentum.

market_impact.rationale: Industrial sector benefits from increased freight movement signaling demand growth.

trade_logic.entry: Enter long XLI when daily railcar loads increase >5% day-over-day and XLI outperforms SPY
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 5 trading days or if railcar loads decline 3% day-over-day

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Railcar load data is daily and sensitive to industrial demand shifts.

idea: Political insider filing surge in technology sector executives selling with bearish XLK signal

data.source: Political insider filings daily technology sector executive sales and Yahoo Finance daily XLK prices

behavior: A cluster of insider sales by tech execs can signal near-term sector weakness or profit-taking ahead of headwinds.

market_impact.rationale: Tech insider sales often precede near-term sector pullbacks.

trade_logic.entry: Short XLK if insider filings show >3 executives selling on same day and XLK underperforms SPY
trade_logic.exit: Cover after 7 trading days or if insider selling cluster dissipates

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Political insider filings happen daily with clusters common enough to trigger signal.

idea: Weekly Google Trends spike for 'gas shortage' correlated with XLE underperformance

data.source: Google Trends weekly for 'gas shortage' and Yahoo Finance weekly XLE prices

behavior: Sudden consumer concern about gasoline availability tends to depress energy sector sentiment and pricing.

market_impact.rationale: Energy demand fears weigh on sector prices and outlook.

trade_logic.entry: Short XLE when 'gas shortage' searches rise >25% week-over-week and XLE underperforms SPY weekly
trade_logic.exit: Cover after 3 weeks or when search interest declines by 15%

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Gas shortage concerns are common and spike during supply disruptions.

idea: Local economy weirdness: weekly surge in food bank requests with XLP weakness

data.source: Weekly food bank request counts scraped from public local charity tables and Yahoo Finance weekly XLP prices

behavior: Increasing food bank demand signals rising consumer hardship, often preceding consumer staples sector weakness.

market_impact.rationale: Consumer staples can be pressured by growing economic hardship signals.

trade_logic.entry: Short XLP when food bank requests increase >10% week-over-week and XLP underperforms SPY
trade_logic.exit: Cover after 4 weeks or when requests flatten or decline

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Food bank request data updates weekly and spikes with local economic stress.

idea: Daily earthquake activity spike near major freight hubs with short-term XLI weakness

data.source: USGS daily earthquake activity near freight hubs and Yahoo Finance daily XLI prices

behavior: Increased seismic activity near freight hubs can disrupt supply chains, pressuring industrial stocks.

market_impact.rationale: Supply chain disruption risks weigh on industrial sector.

trade_logic.entry: Short XLI if daily earthquakes >3 magnitude increase by 50% day-over-day near key hubs and XLI underperforms SPY
trade_logic.exit: Cover after 5 trading days or when earthquake activity normalizes

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Earthquake activity fluctuates daily with occasional regional surges.

data.source: Google Trends weekly for 'cyberattack' and Yahoo Finance weekly XLC prices

behavior: Rising cyberattack concern often causes investor caution in communications and tech infrastructure sectors.

market_impact.rationale: Heightened cyber risk awareness can pressure communications sector stocks.

trade_logic.entry: Short XLC when 'cyberattack' searches increase >20% week-over-week and XLC underperforms SPY
trade_logic.exit: Cover after 3 weeks or when search interest declines

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Cybersecurity concerns frequently trend weekly on news cycles.

behavior: Rapid expansion of EV charging infrastructure signals accelerating EV adoption benefiting communications and infrastructure-related stocks.

trade_logic.entry: Enter long XLC if daily new charger activations increase >10% day-over-day and XLC outperforms SPY
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 7 trading days or if activations decline

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: EV charger activations are daily and often show bursts.
